overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a drive through a dense, fog-shrouded futuristic metropolis. The player navigates a sleek vehicle from neon-lit commercial streets onto an elevated highway through heavy fog, concluding with a pan to the luxurious vehicle interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial canyon with holographic advertising towers

agents.ego_description: piloting futuristic vehicle through neon-lit commercial district with towering holographic advertisements

entered.detail: sleek interior dashboard with green holographic instrument displays and illuminated control panels
tall building facade covered in digital advertising screens displaying 'ALL FOODS' and other brand messaging
towering modern glass buildings lining both sides of the street creating an urban canyon
large purple humanoid holographic advertisement floating between buildings
illuminated yellow advertisement displayed on building facade ahead

segments.scene_description: Driving through a dense futuristic commercial canyon with towering glass skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The vehicle's sleek dashboard with green holographic displays is visible as it navigates between buildings illuminated by neon purple and yellow digital signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through foggy futuristic metropolis

events.description: vehicle ascends ramp leaving dense commercial district for elevated highway
visibility decreases significantly as vehicle enters heavy fog bank obscuring distant cityscape

agents.ego_description: navigating elevated highway through dense fog with reduced visibility, passing alongside tall corporate towers

entered.detail: metal safety barrier running along the left edge of the elevated roadway
dense gray fog obscuring the horizon and distant city structures
dark mountain range barely visible through the heavy fog in the distance
tall building with vertical illuminated strips and advertisement panels running down its facade

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions onto an elevated highway leaving the dense commercial district behind. Driving through thick fog with limited visibility, the scene features a metal guardrail on the left and a massive corporate tower with vertical lighting on the right, while distant mountains barely pierce the gray haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury vehicle interior with quilted leather seating

events.description: camera pans right from forward driving view to passenger side interior

agents.ego_description: glancing toward the passenger seat area while vehicle continues moving forward

entered.detail: black quilted leather passenger seat with diamond stitching pattern
interior roof section with green ambient lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The camera pans right to reveal the luxurious vehicle interior, showcasing the quilted leather passenger seat and ambient ceiling lighting. Through the side window, the corporate tower remains visible in the foggy distance while the dashboard shifts to the left of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial canyon into a desolate, fog-shrouded highway. It begins by navigating through towering glass skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements, with the vehicle's green holographic dashboard visible against a backdrop of purple and yellow digital signage. As the car leaves the dense district, the scene shifts onto an elevated highway where visibility drops sharply due to thick gray fog, leaving only a metal guardrail and a massive corporate tower with vertical lighting visible. The camera then pans right, moving away from the road to reveal the luxurious quilted leather interior and ambient ceiling lighting of the vehicle. Finally, the view settles on the cabin while the corporate tower remains a dim silhouette in the foggy distance through the side window.
